title: One meeting, several people
description: A single meeting with multiple distinct attendees from the same company. Tests one shared event with several attendees, distinct people, group coworker relationships, and a 'primary contact' note.

turns.content: Yesterday's client kickoff with Acme — three people on their side: Bill Tan (CTO), Grace Owusu (eng lead), and Hiro Tanaka (PM). We scoped the integration.
Logged a client kickoff with Acme (yesterday, Jun 8) — attendees Bill Tan (CTO), Grace Owusu (eng lead), and Hiro Tanaka (PM), topic: integration scoping. One event, three people. Anything to flag?
Hiro's the main point of contact. And Bill, Grace, and Hiro are all coworkers at Acme.
Marked Hiro Tanaka as the primary contact and linked Bill, Grace, and Hiro as Acme coworkers. Saved.
